SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Interface ExternalSolverRule

All Superinterfaces:
BuiltInRule, HasOrigin, Named, Rule, Rule, RuleExecutor<Goal>
All Known Implementing Classes:
IsabelleRule, SMTRule
public interface ExternalSolverRule extends BuiltInRule
Interface for the rules of external solvers

  • Method Details

    • createApp

      <T extends ExternalSolverRule> AbstractExternalSolverRuleApp<T> createApp(String successfulSolverName)

    • createApp

      <T extends ExternalSolverRule> AbstractExternalSolverRuleApp<T> createApp(String successfulSolverName, ImmutableList<PosInOccurrence> unsatCore)
      Create a new rule application with the given solver name and unsat core.
      Parameters:
      successfulSolverName - solver that produced this result
      unsatCore - formulas required to prove the result
      Returns:
      rule application instance

    • createApp

      IBuiltInRuleApp createApp(PosInOccurrence pos, TermServices services)
      Specified by:
      createApp in interface BuiltInRule

    • isApplicable

      default boolean isApplicable(Goal goal, PosInOccurrence pio)
      Description copied from interface: BuiltInRule
      Returning true iff a rule is applicable at the given position. This does not necessarily mean that a rule application will change the goal (this decision is made due to performance reasons)
      Specified by:
      isApplicable in interface BuiltInRule

    • isApplicableOnSubTerms

      Specified by:
